div.head: The Secretary of State to the Chargé in Iran (Ford)
div.p:
52. With reference to your despatch 759, December 15,Not printed. Iranian Minister hereMohammed Shayesteh. has not approached Department concerning resumption
of negotiations for agreement covering presence of American forces in Iran. You may bring this fact to the attention of Iranian officials should inquiry be made.

The Department believes that the Prime MinisterAli Soheily. will agree on reflection that in his note of August 21 to the Legation quoted in Legation’s telegram 874, August 23,
Foreign Relations, 1943, vol. iv, p. 471. he did not intend to place the United States in an unfavorable light in a manner entirely unjustified by the facts. Please take this matter up informally and confidentially with the Prime Minister, making the discreet suggestion that in order to put the record straight he may desire to withdraw his note of August 21.
